sourceMovie.title: Armour of God
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Armour of God for the same reason it broke through in 1986: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a action rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Jackie Chan keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The adventure and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Sahara
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Armour of God clicked for you, Sahara (2005) is a strong next stop: both trade in adventure and action, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Armour of God?
faq.answer: Try Sahara, City Hunter, The Legend—each shares DNA with Armour of God while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Armour of God?
faq.answer: Armour of God (1986) is best described as Adventure, Action, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Armour of God part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Armour of God Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
